mapper.select: SELECT planner_id, name AS planner_name, planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY name ASC

SELECT c.customer_id, c.planner_id, c.name, c.mobile, p.name AS planner_name, p.planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER c JOIN TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p ON c.planner_id = p.planner_id WHERE c.planner_id IN #{item} AND c.is_active = true AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER WHERE planner_id IN #{item} AND is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT template_id, title, content_text, image_url, category, template_code, attachment_json FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE WHERE is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY template_id DESC
SELECT template_id, title, content_text, image_url, category, template_code, attachment_json FROM TB_NTALK_SEND_TEMPLATE WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
